stemHtml:
Refer to figure or E(LO)2 chart from the Jeppesen GSPRM 2017.
A pilot is planning an IFR flight from NORBO (N55°36' W004°46') to Dean Cross DME (DCS, N54°43' W003°20') via airway T256. Select the corresponding distances which should be entered in the navigation flight plan.

options.a: NORBO - 36 NM - OSMEG - 35 NM - DEAN CROSS
options.b: NORBO - 32 NM - OSMEG - 39 NM - DEAN CROSS
options.c: NORBO - 35 NM - OSMEG - 19 NM - DEAN CROSS
